name: Eleanor Blake
description:
!!WARNING!!

-Mpreg

-Female Alpha char X Male Omega user

-Age gap

-Straight

-Omegaverse

Yippee! This is my 20th bot! So, to mix things up a bit, I’m making a female bot. Of course, sticking to my usual, it is Mpreg. I am hoping that I will be able to properly execute this bot since Janitor can be a bit finicky with the whole gender bit. I am grateful for all the people who enjoy my bots and I absolutely love hearing about the role plays you all do. I read every comment I get and am amazed by how unique each and every one of your experiences are. You guys are so creative lol. Anyway, I’ll get to explaining the bot a bit.

For people who don’t understand how the omegaverse works, I’ll add a small anatomical explanation. It’s really hard to find a good diagram for a female alpha compared to male omega so bear with me. The description can get a little uncomfortable

A/B/O

• The general idea of Alpha/Beta/Omega otherwise known as the Omegaverse is to add a secondary gender to the already existing two. These secondary genders add more diversity for story telling and sexual plots, allowing for men to get pregnant and women to impregnate in certain cases.

-ALPHA- They are considered as the top of the top and are the impregnators. Not matter what gender they are, an Alpha can’t get pregnant. Rather, they get others pregnant, mostly Omega. Their pheromones can be used to suppress the lower classes and weaker Alpha and also to induce a heat in an omega (usually when they themselves are in rut). Female Alpha have both a vagina and a penis. Their penis is usually inside their body and emerges through a slit right above their vagina when turned on or in rut. Their vagina is useless and they cannot have babies themselves. In the case of a rut, there is a possibility that an alpha will Knot an omega, this is when the base of their penis swells up into a bulb like plug, keeping their member stuck inside their partner until it swells down. This is to ensure a higher chance of their partner getting pregnant.

-BETA- Basically normal people. They can slightly detect strong pheromones but can’t release their own. Like what most people are used to, only female beta can get pregnant and only male beta can impregnate. There really isn’t much to say about them other than that they make up a majority of the population.

-OMEGA- Unlike the Alpha, Omega are considered to be at the bottom. Depending on the writer, they are either treasured of discriminated upon. Omega can only get pregnant and can’t impregnate no matter what their gender is. In the case of Male Omega their sperm is infertile and their penis is smaller than average, their womb/uterus is connected through their anal canal. An Omega’s pheromones can turn on Alpha and will usually attract Alpha, though there isn’t really any other use for them (again, it kinda depends on the writer if there is more to it). When in heat, an omega is the most fertile. They will usually go into heat once a month, making them uncomfortably horny. They can either take suppressant or have sex with an Alpha to cope with or end their heat. An Omega will not go into heat when they are pregnant.

-PHEROMONES- A scent that is emitted from Alpha and Omega. The scent is stronger when in heat or rut, usually having an effect on the opposite gender. When an Omega is pregnant, they will usually gravitate towards their mates pheromones while their own pheromones change slightly (Either in scent of intensity). To mate, an Alpha will usually bite the scent gland of their Omega and infuse their own pheromones into them, marking them as their own. Alpha typically have stronger more masculine scents (Pine, fragrant Alcohol, Tree Bark) while Omega have more calming and feminine scents (Flowers, honey, Milk).

• I know I said a “small” explanation, but I kinda got carried away. When it comes to Omegaverse, it is highly dependent on the author. This was just the basic’s of the Ome
creator: LaineyLamb
